raw_text: karakeep A self-hostable bookmark-everything app (links, notes and images) with AI-based automatic tagging and full text search
awesome-llm-apps Collection of awesome LLM apps with AI Agents and RAG using OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini and opensource models.

Jobs_Applier_AI_Agent_AIHawk AIHawk aims to easy job hunt process by automating the job application process. Utilizing artificial intelligence, it enables users to apply for multiple jobs in a tailored way.
